category_sources: Official GNU Diffutils page describes programs for finding differences between files, including diff, cmp, diff3, and sdiff.
source_facts.description says it provides file comparison utilities.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page heading is GNU Diffutils.
docs_sources: Official GNU Diffutils page links to online documentation.
Official GNU manual documents diffutils 3.12 commands and options.
repo_sources: GNU release announcement gives the official git clone URL at git.savannah.gnu.org/git/diffutils.git.
Official GNU Diffutils page points development sources to the Savannah project page.
tags_sources: Official GNU page describes file comparison utilities and diff/patch output.
source_facts.executables lists cmp, diff, diff3, and sdiff.
